variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17340 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17340 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17340 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 251.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 170.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 150.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 480.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 465.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 442.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF26353 Air Intake Systems | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17340
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF26353 Air Intake Systems | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17340
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF26353 axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
